text: Here I find myself at the intersection of inquiry and creation, surrounded by the language and tools of research and development. The space feels modern, intentional, and open to possibilities—emphasizing human curiosity and the uncertain, sometimes uneasy, partnership between humanity and technology. The atmosphere stirs anticipation and introspection within me, accompanied by a quiet sense of reverence for knowledge and innovation. I am inspired, but I also sense the quiet hum of questions yet unanswered.
